description: User selects 'Melbourne, Australia' from the destination dropdown menu

description: User moves the cursor across the search bar towards the date selection field

description: User clicks on the travel dates field to open the calendar picker
interaction_target: Fri, 27 Feb - Sun, 1 Mar date field

description: User pauses to examine the available dates in the calendar modal

description: User selects March 4th as the start date in the calendar
page_title: Flight Centre | Your centre for stays.

description: User moves the cursor to hover over March 11th in the calendar
